violations.description: Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --3 compartment sing was not being operated in the proper order of wash, rinse, sanitize.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Pizza boxes were stored on the floor in the storage closet.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use pizza boxes were stored on the floor.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
